hand_rubber_glove.prompt: A bright yellow rubber cleaning glove (empty, no hand inside, in a relaxed natural shape with fingers slightly curled forward), glossy rubber surface with soft cream highlights, the wrist/cuff opening visible. Apply the tool orientation rule: shown in side profile, the wrist/cuff in the LOWER-RIGHT of the image, the fingertips extending diagonally toward the UPPER-LEFT, the side of the glove and fingers fully visible.

brush_A.prompt: A wooden-handled cleaning scrub brush with an oval head of cream-coloured stiff bristles. Apply the tool orientation rule: shown in side profile, the wooden handle in the LOWER-RIGHT of the image, the bristle head extending diagonally toward the UPPER-LEFT. The SIDE of the bristle cluster is fully visible — bristles fanning toward upper-left, individual bristle texture clear, like a premium product photograph of a scrub brush laid diagonally.

hose_A.prompt: A garden hose spray gun / nozzle, chrome and green-plastic body, trigger grip handle. plastic_bag_circuit_cover.prompt: Look at the AC unit in the reference image which has TWO protective plastic bags installed on it. EXTRACT JUST the SMALL BLUE-TINTED translucent plastic bag (the one wrapping over the green circuit board on the right side of the AC) and present it ALONE as a detached cleaning tool lying isolated on a flat WHITE background. Preserve the EXACT SAME shape, crumple pattern, soft folds, blue plastic tint and semi-transparency as the bag has in the reference image — it should look like the same bag, just removed from the AC and shown on its own. Apply the tool orientation rule: shown laid flat diagonally across the frame, the gathered closed end in the LOWER-RIGHT of the image, the open mouth of the bag extending diagonally toward the UPPER-LEFT. The full bag is clearly visible. NO writing, NO logos, NO contents inside. Soft warm top-left lighting, gentle soft shadow. Premium product-render. Centered, 15% padding.

No foam, no spray, no liquid, no second bottle, no duplicate parts.
